description: M-26-14 Element 4 extended retention for High Value Asset / High Impact System data streams. Same Day-1 Hot/Frozen architecture as the L3/L4 policies with extended timing: hot tier (0-365d) = 12-month searchable window, frozen tier via Searchable Snapshots (365d+) = retrievable through 24 months and beyond. No automatic delete phase: retirement is governed exclusively by the WS6 two-gate workflow. Apply selectively to HVA datasets: PUT logs-{hva-dataset}-*/_settings { "index.lifecycle.name": "m_26_14-logs-hva-extended" }.
